title: Multi-Agent Research Assistant
label: AGENTIC RESEARCH
description: A multi-agent research system that gathers evidence, synthesizes findings, structures the result, and delivers a usable report.

title: Document Intelligence RAG
label: KNOWLEDGE SYSTEM
description: A document assistant that ingests files, retrieves relevant chunks, and answers questions using grounded context.

title: OpsPilot AI
label: SRE + FINOPS
description: An autonomous SRE and FinOps command center for incident simulation, signal analysis, and structured action reports.

title: Smart Email Classification
label: WORKFLOW AUTOMATION
description: An email workflow that classifies messages, extracts intent, records structured data, and prepares downstream actions.

title: AI Resume Screening Workflow
label: HR AUTOMATION
description: A hiring workflow for parsing resumes, comparing them with job requirements, scoring candidates, and supporting shortlisting.
